disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has completely run out of her regular daily heart-rate medication; took the last dose this morning and the evening dose is due tonight
trigger_question_examples: What has brought you to contact us today?
When did you last take your medication and how much is left?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took my last heart tablet this morning and the box is completely empty. I take it every night as well and I've got nothing for tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports a fluttering, racing feeling in the chest and self-counted fast, slightly irregular pulse, with prominent anxiety
trigger_question_examples: What are you feeling in your chest right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels like it's fluttering and when I count my pulse it's fast and a bit all over the place — around 110. I'm really anxious about it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No crushing or pressure-type chest pain
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain, pressure or tightness?
Does the feeling spread to your arm, neck or jaw?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there's no real pain or pressure — it's more a fluttering and my own worry. It doesn't spread anywhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fainting, blackout or feeling of passing out
trigger_question_examples: Have you fainted or felt like you might pass out?
Do you feel dizzy when you stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't fainted or felt like I'm going to pass out. Just anxious.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No severe shortness of breath at rest and no leg swelling
trigger_question_examples: Are you short of breath sitting still?
Any swelling of your ankles or trouble lying flat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My breathing is okay sitting here — I'm not gasping — and my legs aren't swollen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing atrial fibrillation, usually well controlled on the daily tablet; last saw the cardiologist about 3 months ago
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about your heart condition and how it's usually managed.
When did you last see your heart specialist?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had an irregular heartbeat for years and the tablet keeps it steady. I saw my heart specialist about three months ago and everything was fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or symptoms of infection
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, chills or signs of an infection?
Have you felt unwell or hot and shivery in the last day or two?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever or anything like that, I don't feel unwell in that way.
